mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rapid labor market deterioration signals impending recession, triggering risk-off equity selling within one week as investors price in lower future earnings.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in consumer credit and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand, supporting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative forward returns in > 60% of observations across any 3-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp industrial production declines in a supply-constrained environment indicate demand destruction, compressing equity multiples over the following month.
failure_condition: Industrial production drops coincide with positive 20-day equity returns in > 55% of cases over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained quarter-over-quarter real GDP growth expands corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP growth shows no predictive power for 60-day forward returns (t-stat < 1.0) across multiple decades.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation readings above the 3.5% threshold force market pricing of prolonged restrictive policy, depressing equity valuations within one week.
failure_condition: Inflation prints above 3.5% are followed by positive 5-day equity returns in > 60% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with a stable or falling unemployment rate confirms a healthy labor market, reducing recession risk and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint payroll and unemployment signal yields negative forward returns in > 50% of rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in housing permits during a rate-hike cycle signals aggressive demand cooling, triggering immediate equity risk-off positioning within one week.
failure_condition: Housing permit declines during rate hikes are followed by positive 5-day equity returns in > 55% of cases.
